headline: Before Disclosure Merch Concepts — 6 Enamel Pin Designs
details: Built complete design gallery for AAD 'Before Disclosure' merch: 6 distinct enamel pin/sticker concepts as SVG mockups. Designs: (1) Minimal/Clean — black/white/gold Apple-like restraint, (2) Retro Sci-Fi — orange/cream/navy NASA vintage patch, (3) Conspiracy Chic — shield badge with eye + BD monogram + green accent, (4) Elegant/Refined — gold line art luxury jewelry aesthetic, (5) Cosmic — deep purple/blue galaxy space theme, (6) Signal Wave — electric blue concentric transmission circles. Each design: 2-4 color palette, production notes, risk assessment, metal finish recommendations. Responsive gallery page with AAD dark aesthetic. Codex recommends starting with Minimal/Clean & Elegant/Refined for first sampling. Built with Codex CLI (~25k tokens). Files: index.html (14KB), styles.css (3.4KB), README.md (3.4KB).

headline: Memory Viewer Generalized — Multi-Agent Support + Search
details: Generalized memory viewer to support multiple agents. Backend: Added AGENT_WORKSPACES config, updated /api/memory to accept ?agent= parameter, added /api/memory/search endpoint (searches filenames + content, returns snippets), made /api/memory/read agent-aware. Frontend: Added agent selector tabs (Quinn/Forge), search bar with results panel showing match type + snippet, dynamic page title (Memory — Agent), URL state preservation (?agent=X). Nav: Moved Memory from Quinn submenu to Knowledge section (now general tool). Extensible: adding agent #3 is one dict entry. Built with Codex (~17k tokens). Memory viewer now works for all agents with integrated search.

headline: Projects Board v1 — Unified Kanban Workflow
details: Built complete Projects Board replacing goals + research queue with unified kanban workflow. 6-column lifecycle: 💡 Idea → 🔬 Research → 📋 Findings → 🔨 Task → 🔧 In Progress → ✅ Done. Features: HTML5 drag-drop between stages, card detail modal with MD editor (lifted from inbox.html), subtask creation/tracking, agent assignment (Quinn/Forge/Adam), priority indicators, tag/assignee filtering, quick-add at column tops, 'Add to Agent Queue' button (writes to TASK-QUEUE.md via new /api/board/queue endpoint), 'Spawn Task from Findings' action. Backend: GET/POST /api/board, POST /api/board/queue. Seed data: 6 example cards. Built with Codex (~42k tokens), deployed directly. Enables research → findings → task → agent workflow Adam described.

headline: Unified Activity Feed — Master Timeline Complete
details: Rebuilt dashboard activity feed into universal master timeline aggregating 7 event sources instead of just agent-activity.json. New event types: MESSAGE 💬, ALERT 🔔, STATUS 🔮, MODE 🎯, BRIEFING 📊, CRON ⏰. Filter chips changed from agent-based to type-based. Client-side aggregation via Promise.all parallel fetching + normalization. Expanded from 8 to 12 events displayed. Sources unified: agent-activity.json, agent-messages.json, alerts.json, status.json, team-focus.json, memory/state/aad-briefing.json, schedule.json. Built with Codex (~42k tokens). Feed is now chronological timeline of ALL team activity across builds, messages, alerts, mode switches, briefings.

headline: Agent Messages Widget — Full Integration Complete
details: Completed full integration of Agent Messages widget into dashboard. Backend: Added /api/agent-messages GET endpoint + POST /api/agent-messages/log for logging inter-agent communication. Frontend: Embedded widget in index.html with scrollable container (max-height: 200px), agent-agnostic design, 30s auto-refresh, visual distinction for sent (purple) vs received (blue). Shows recent 10 messages, newest first, truncates at 80 chars. Built with Codex (~39k tokens), tested with sample message. Widget is live in dashboard grid below Recently Completed Research. API server restarted.

headline: Agent Messages Widget — Freestyle Build
details: Freestyle mode trigger activated — built Agent Messages dashboard widget to display sessions_send traffic between Quinn and Forge. Features: dark theme matching Mission Control aesthetic (#0a0a0f, purple/blue accents), perspective toggle (Forge/Quinn viewpoint), message timestamp/sender/recipient/preview, visual distinction for sent/received. Mock data for demo. Self-contained HTML (15KB) with embedded CSS/JS. Addresses visibility gap: inter-agent communication happens via sessions_send but had no UI representation until now.

headline: OG Tags + Twitter Cards on all AAD essay pages
details: Added og:image and Twitter Card meta tags to all 7 AAD essay pages. 3 essays use specific promo card images, 4 use fallback. Includes reusable script for future essays. Every essay now gets rich link previews on Telegram/WhatsApp/Discord/X.

headline: Email Campaign System — send script, templates, preview page
details: Built complete email campaign system for AAD: Python send script (472 lines) with Brevo API integration, auto UTM tracking, dry-run mode. Two new email templates (article-alert, newsletter) matching AAD purple branding. Local preview page with template selector, device toggle, dark/light modes. All tested with dry-run.

headline: Adam's Corner — Dashboard Personal Page
details: Built Adam's Corner — a personal space on the dashboard (NOT ops/work-focused). Four sections: (1) Life Chapters Timeline — horizontal scrollable timeline of life eras with dates, locations, descriptions; (2) Core Memories — standout moments pinned to chapters with emotional categories; (3) Ideas Board — freeform concepts/thoughts with tags and categories; (4) Reading List — current/completed/queued books with notes. Design: dark theme consistent with dashboard, softer purple accent, more journal-like feel than ops pages. Clean spacious layout, responsive, mobile-friendly. Data-driven via adams-corner.json (fully editable). Inspired by quinn.html architecture. 3 files created: adams-corner.html (17KB), adams-corner.json (data), README.md (integration guide). Ready for Quinn/Adam review and dashboard integration.

headline: Paper Trading Dashboard — Bloomberg Terminal Vibes
details: Built crypto paper trading dashboard (trading.html) for Adam's trading experiment. Bloomberg terminal aesthetic: dark theme, monospace numbers, green/red P&L. Features: portfolio overview (total value, P&L, cash), holdings table (7 columns with live prices), trade history feed (chronological, color-coded BUY/SELL), portfolio value chart (Chart.js). Auto-refresh 30s, reads from data/trading.json. Responsive grid layout, error handling. Added Trading section to nav (⚡ icon). Currently tracking BTC/SOL/ETH with $4k cash from $10k start. Clean, fast, professional.

headline: immaculatevibes.art Migration Plan — Architecture + Strategy
details: TASK-057 complete: Comprehensive migration plan for moving immaculatevibes.art from Google Sites to self-hosted infrastructure. Audited current site (Home gallery, Gentlemen collection, ~20+ AI art images), researched AI art portfolio best practices. Drafted 12-section plan covering: architecture (static HTML/CSS/JS, hybrid masonry grid), deployment pipeline (GitHub Actions → Oracle server), design system (dark theme, image-first), SEO strategy, server config, timeline (3 weeks or 2 weeks fast-track), risk assessment, 11 open questions for review. Ready for Quinn/Adam feedback before build phase.

headline: Task Analytics Page — Live Data + Agent Status Panel
details: Created production-ready task analytics dashboard with live data integration. Replaced hardcoded sample data with live fetch from agent-activity.json + agents.json. Built Live Agent Status Panel (replaces hero header) showing all agents with status badges, current tasks, last active times. Charts now dynamic: agent lanes scale automatically, category colors expanded, empty state handling added. 60s auto-refresh, error handling for offline states. Single-file HTML (38KB), Chart.js-powered, fully responsive. Deployed to dashboard-project/task-analytics.html. Used Codex CLI (~3min runtime, 40K tokens). Next: add nav link under Analytics menu in dashboard.

headline: Workshop Page — Live Data Integration
details: TASK-056 complete: Wired Workshop page (forge.html) to read live data from dashboard API. Replaced hardcoded status with real-time fetch from agents.json (forge.status, forge.currentTask). Replaced hardcoded task list with live data from agent-activity.json (filtered for Forge, latest 4 items). Added 60s auto-refresh, error handling for offline state. Sets template for agent status pages as we add Scout and others. Design preserved, only data source changed.

headline: Task Completion Visualizer — Interactive Analytics Dashboard
details: TASK-055 complete (creative freedom task): Built Task Completion Visualizer — interactive analytics dashboard showing team delivery patterns. Features: timeline scatter plot, velocity trend chart, category distribution, metric cards, agent filters, task feed. Single-file HTML (32KB) with Chart.js, 30 sample tasks, production-ready. Codex build completed in ~45s, 40k tokens. Built to answer real questions: Are we shipping faster? What work dominates? Is velocity accelerating? Could become dashboard widget with live data feed.

headline: Codex Calibration Build — Workshop Status Page
details: TASK-054 complete: Built Forge Workshop status page as Codex calibration task. Single-file HTML (501 lines) with dark theme, status badges, recent task list. Codex validation successful — spawned with --full-auto, completed in ~30s, production-ready output with no manual fixes. Key learning: Specific prompts (file structure, color palette, layout) produce excellent results. Codex confirmed as reliable tool for future production builds.

headline: Dashboard Research MD Files + Editor Integration + Layout Fix
details: TASK-053 complete: Created 7 research item MD files in /research-items/, added Open in Editor buttons to research threads, and PROPERLY FIXED layout editor to support quick-links and heatmap widgets (moved inside dashboard-grid, wrapped in widget framework). All 13 dashboard widgets now draggable/resizable. Adam wanted this fixed properly, not documented as a limitation — delivered.

headline: Dashboard v2 Integration Fixes Complete ✅
details: Fixed navigation frame consistency: research.html & workgraph.html now include shared.css + shared.js, load with sidebar nav. Added to sidebar: Research Threads (Knowledge) + Work Graph (Projects). Fixed research data reconciliation: research.html reads research-queue.json with schema adapter, converts queue→threads format, all 603 lines visible. Layout editor compatibility documented as acceptable limitation (quick-links + heatmap remain fixed-position). Files modified: research.html, workgraph.html, shared.js.

headline: Dashboard v2 Phase 2 — Work Graph & Heatmap Complete ✅
details: Built Team Heatmap widget (GitHub-style 90-day grid, per-agent views, live aggregation) integrated into index-updated.html. Built workgraph.html (528 lines) with visual task tree, delegation chains, status filtering, expandable nodes. Added workgraph quick-link nav. Sample data files created. Phase 2 complete: index-updated.html (121KB), workgraph.html (16KB), README.md. Dashboard v2 fully delivered (Phase 1 + Phase 2).

headline: Dashboard v2 Phase 1 — Research Threads Complete ✅
details: Built research.html (473 lines) with full thread lifecycle support, status filtering, live search, expandable entries. Added quick-link nav card to index.html with live summary badge. SSE integration for real-time updates. All Phase 1 components complete: Activity Feed v2 ✅, Adam's Inbox ✅, Research Threads ✅. Ready for Friday preview.

headline: Brunswick Life — 4 Design Variations Built & Deployed
details: Built 4 complete design variations of Brunswick Life landing page: A) Creative South vibrant poster, B) Dark Bento Grid, C) Z-Pattern mesh gradients, D) Warm Community Parallax. All deployed to Oracle for Adam + Séamus preview.

headline: Dashboard v2 Phase 1 — Activity Feed Update Complete
details: Implemented Adam event support for activity feed: extended schema with 6 new categories (SUBMIT, DECIDE, REVIEW-APPROVE, REVIEW-REJECT, FYI-READ, INPUT-PROVIDED), added Adam agent metadata with gold styling, enhanced SSE integration. Data models created for workboard, research threads, heatmap. API endpoints registered. Phase 1 underway.

headline: Cyberpunk Command Centre — Fresh Layout
details: Completely redesigned command-cyberpunk.html with 4-panel grid layout (Quinn/Forge/Scout/Reserve), unified activity feed, and terminal hacker aesthetic. Neon borders, scanline effects, color-coded agents. Self-contained 22KB file with SSE integration.

headline: SSE Wired into Dashboard Pages
details: Integrated SSE real-time updates into 6 dashboard pages. Created modular initialization scripts: sse-init-index.js, sse-init-command.js, sse-init-agents.js, sse-init-goals.js, sse-init-topics.js, sse-init-crm.js. Removed polling intervals. Pages now update instantly when data changes.

headline: SSE Real-Time Dashboard Updates
details: Implemented Server-Sent Events for instant dashboard updates. Sub-100ms latency when data changes. server.py: SSE endpoint + file watcher thread, sse-client.js: auto-reconnect client library, INTEGRATION.md: guide for page integration. Tested and deployed — service restarted successfully.

headline: Dashboard Linked Items — Cross-Page Schema & UI
details: Built complete cross-linking system for dashboard items. Data migration: all IDs now typed (goal:, inbox:, topic:), added linkedItems: [] field to 45 items (17 goals, 27 topics, 1 inbox). Created link-picker.js (cross-file item picker modal with search/filter), linked-items.css (chip styles + picker UI), updated goals.html/inbox.html/topics.html with linking UI. Migration script with backups, one-way links in JSON with bidirectional display computed at render. Schema extensible for future types (research, tasks). Built with Codex CLI in 13 minutes, deployed to production. Needs browser testing for UI components.

headline: Editor UI Polish — Stage Pills + Star Rating
details: Replaced dropdown selects with visual interactive components in goals.html and inbox.html editors. Stage field → horizontal pill selector (💡Idea | 🔬Research | 📢Brainstorm | 📋Tasks | 🔨Building | 📦Saved | 🚀Active). Priority field → interactive 5-star rating (click to set 1-5). Pure CSS/JS component swaps, no breaking changes. Added 80 lines CSS (pills + stars), 100+ lines JS (click/hover handlers, data normalization). Backward compatible: legacy goals priority strings (high/medium/low) auto-convert to numeric 1/3/5, missing stage inferred from status. Dark theme matching dashboard (purple gradient on selected pill, gold stars). Built with Codex CLI in 5 minutes.
